List Your Santa Profile

Join the UK's premium directory of professional Santa performers. Reach families, venues, and businesses looking for trusted Santas for hire.

Why List on SantaDirectory?

Everything you need to showcase your Santa services and attract new bookings.

Maximum Visibility

Your profile is seen by thousands of visitors searching for professional Santas.

Area Discovery

Appear in location-based searches when customers look for Santas near them.

SEO Exposure

Benefit from our search engine optimisation — your profile ranks when people search online.

Featured Profiles

Stand out from the crowd with featured placement on the homepage and listings page.

Trust Badges

Display your DBS check, real beard status, and other credentials to build trust.

Professional Platform

Present your services on a modern, premium directory built for professional performers.

Get Started

We're currently curating our early listings by hand to ensure every profile meets our quality standards. Fill in the form below and we'll be in touch to help build your profile.

Pricing

From £150 / year

Listing packages start from £150 per year. We offer different tiers depending on the features you need. Get in touch to discuss the best option for you.
